description_long: This is a large, cubic wooden storage box with a rustic appearance, constructed from planks of medium-brown wood. The box features prominent diagonal and cross-bracing on each visible side, secured at the corners with dark, round fasteners, giving it a reinforced and sturdy look. The wood grain is clearly visible, adding to its rugged, utilitarian aesthetic, and the surface appears slightly rough and matte. The top of the box is flat and solid, with no visible hinges, handles, or openings, suggesting it is a sealed or nailed-shut crate. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional, industrial design. This type of box is commonly used for storage or shipping in urban environments such as warehouses, garages, or construction sites.
description: A large, reinforced wooden storage crate with cross-bracing and a rustic, matte finish. The box is solid, unadorned, and built for durability in industrial or urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing a wooden crate with diagonal bracing from top left to bottom right and visible fasteners at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a full X-shaped cross-bracing pattern and all four corner fasteners clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with diagonal bracing from top right to bottom left and three visible fasteners.
description_view_3: Rear view with a prominent X-shaped cross-bracing and all four fasteners visible, similar to view 1.
